zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Cave於1465年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃時，他的父親Thomas Cave20歲，母親Thomasine Passemer15歲。他於1490年與Elizabeth Mervin在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾邱奇 勞福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1530年在英國諾薩普頓史爾被列為high sheriff of northamptonshire。他去世於1538年4月20日在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Cave于1465年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃时，他的父亲Thomas Cave20岁，母亲Thomasine Passemer15岁。他于1490年与Elizabeth Mervin在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾邱奇 勞福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1530年在英国諾薩普頓史爾被列为high sheriff of northamptonshire。他去世于1538年4月20日在英国諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃。

nameMeanings.name: Cave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire called Cave, apparently from a river name derived from Old English cāf ‘swift’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Norman and Picard Old French cauf (from Latin calvus) ‘bald’.
French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a cave, from Old French cave ‘cave’, ‘cellar’ (from Latin cavea, a derivative of cavus ‘hollow’).

variants.name: Cavin
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of Caveen, a shortened form of Manx Mac Dhaimhín, son of Daimhín. The personal name is a diminutive of Gaelic damh ‘bard, poet’.

variants.name: Caves
meanings: English: variant of Cave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Keeve
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Cave  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chaffee
meanings: English (of Norman origin): descriptive nickname from a derivative of Old French chauf ‘bald’ (from Latin calvus). Compare Cave .

variants.name: Cavett
meanings: Scottish (of French origin): altered form of French Cavet, which is either a diminutive of Cave 3 or a metonymic occupational name for a laborer, one who used a cavet, an Old Occitan word for a tool for clearing ground for cultivation.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Cave was born in 1465, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Cave, was 20 and his mother, Thomasine Passemer, was 15. He married Elizabeth Mervin in 1490, in Church Lawford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1530, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of northamptonshire in Northamptonshire, England. He died on 20 April 1538, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Cave est né en 1465, à Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Cave, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Passemer, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mervin en 1490, à Church Lawford, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1530, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of northamptonshire à Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1538, à Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Caveが1465年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンで生まれた時，父Thomas Caveは20歳，母Thomasine Passemerは15歳であった。1490年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアチャーチ ラウフォードでElizabeth Mervinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1530年，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでの職業はhigh sheriff of northamptonshireと記録されている。彼は1538年4月20日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Cave(이)가 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cave(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasine Passemer(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 c후르치 로퍼드에서 Elizabeth Mervin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1530년, 그의 직업은 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 high sheriff of northamptonshire이었다. 그는 1538년 4월 20일 영국 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Mervin em 1490, em Church Lawford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1530, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of northamptonshire em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. ru.Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Engl: станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Cave родился в 1465 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Cave было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Passemer, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mervin в 1490 г. в местности чурч лавфорд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1530 году он работал по профессии high sheriff of northamptonshire в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. Он умер 20 апреля 1538 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Church Lawford, Warwickshire, England: Church Lawford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Cave nació en 1465, en Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Cave, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Thomasine Passemer, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Mervin en 1490, en Church Lawford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1530, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of northamptonshire en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 20 de abril de 1538, en Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
